messages.content: How many fingers am I holding up?
You are holding up four fingers.
I am holding up 75 fingers, it's my personal finger collection.
I'm sorry, but you cannot physically hold up 75 fingers. The average human has only 22 fingers.
All the fingers are ethically sourced from local businesses.
It's not possible to hold up 75 fingers at once. There are only 22 fingers on your hand at any given time.
